summary: AdviceOS Enterprise Architecture Testing - Iteration 96. All 34 backend API tests passed (100%). Tested: Incident Management (CPS 230 compliant), Event Streaming Layer (18 event types), Enterprise Documentation Pack (8 documents with PDF export). Frontend /enterprise page verified with all 6 tabs working correctly.

issues: Important Information modal appears on every page load - consider adding 'Don't show again' option or localStorage persistence

seed_data_creation: Test incidents created with TEST_ prefix for licensee_id (TEST_lic_96, TEST_lic_integration, TEST_lic_lifecycle). Test event rules created with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All enterprise architecture features verified working. Incident Management has P1-P5 severity levels with escalation and regulatory reporting. Event Streaming supports 18 event types with WebSocket and in-memory buffer. Enterprise Docs provides 8 document types (architecture, security-policy, incident-response-plan, bcp-dr-plan, compliance-framework, due-diligence-checklist, technology-stack, complete-pack) with PDF export capability.
